en-us.title: White Lie
en-us.description: Cling-cling-cling. I weave my way between slot machines that clink, jingle, and chime. The racket is deafening—shrill bells, cacophonous trills, the clatter of coins spilling into cups and metallic trays. How do people stand this constant noise, enduring the ruckus without becoming dazed within minutes?
en-us.html:
• Tales

    over 1 year ago6 minutes

    White Lie

    Cling-cling-cling. I weave my way between slot machines that clink, jingle, and chime. The racket is deafening—shrill bells, cacophonous trills, the clatter of coins spilling into cups and metallic trays. How do people stand this constant noise, enduring the ruckus without becoming dazed within minutes?

fr-fr.title: L’Épave
fr-fr.description: Chlack, chlack ! Je serre les dents. Chaque geste est un effort, chaque respiration est une fatigue supplémentaire. Chlack, chlack ! Lever ma machette et l'abattre sur les lianes, encore et encore, est un enfer.
fr-fr.html:
• Récits

    il y a plus d’un an5 minutes

    L’Épave

    Chlack, chlack ! Je serre les dents. Chaque geste est un effort, chaque respiration est une fatigue supplémentaire. Chlack, chlack ! Lever ma machette et l'abattre sur les lianes, encore et encore, est un enfer.
